queries.question: Give me Pixar films and DreamWorks films that won Golden Globe.
queries.sql:
SELECT Film.title 
FROM Film
WHERE (Film.animationStudio = "Pixar" OR Film.animationStudio = "DreamWorks") AND Film.awards = "Golden Globe"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?film a :Films .
  ?film p:title ?title .
  ?film p:animationStudio ?animationstudio_w .
  ?film p:animationStudio ?animationstudio_w2 .
  ?film p:awards ?awards_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?animationstudio_w) = "Pixar" || STR(?animationstudio_w2) = "DreamWorks")) && STR(?awards_w) = "Golden Globe"))
}

queries.sql:
